title: Open Windows Terminal
detail: Launch Windows Terminal using ghost_launch with exe='wt.exe'. Wait for it to open fully before marking done.

title: Navigate to projects directory
detail: Click on the terminal window, set clipboard to 'cd C:\Users\Krist\projects\active', paste with Ctrl+V, then press Enter.

title: List active projects
detail: Set clipboard to 'ls', paste with Ctrl+V, press Enter. When you see the directory listing, task is done.
